name: manage_glossary
description: Create, list, retrieve, or delete custom glossaries that enforce consistent translations for specific terms. Glossaries ensure domain-specific vocabulary is always translated the same way.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A human-readable name for the glossary.

parameters.name: source_lang
parameters.description: Source language code for the glossary entries.

parameters.name: target_lang
parameters.description: Target language code for the glossary entries.

parameters.name: entries
parameters.description: Tab-separated glossary entries (one pair per line: 'source\ttarget').

body.name: Medical Terms EN-DE
body.entries:
patient	Patient
diagnosis	Diagnose
treatment	Behandlung
